000
FXUS61 KOKX 131830
AFDOKX

Area Forecast Discussion
National Weather Service New York NY
230 PM EDT Sat Jun 13 2026

.SYNOPSIS...
There is considerable model disagreement regarding the timing and
placement of the approaching cold front. The 12Z guidance suite shows
a notable spread, with the ECMWF significantly faster than the GFS in
bringing the front through the area. Forecaster confidence in the
high temperature for tomorrow is low given this uncertainty, and the
potential exists for a several-degree bust either way depending on
cloud cover and frontal timing.

.NEAR TERM /THROUGH TONIGHT/...
Increasing clouds ahead of the front. Highs were near normal today.

$$
